'''鈭歮-t-w-th''' ('''kamatwethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:volcanise|volcanise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:volcanise|volcanise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-t-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| kamatwethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimatwethoko|thimatwethoko]] || [[word:jimatwethoko|jimatwethoko]] || [[word:shimatwethoko|shimatwethoko]] || [[word:kimatwethoko|kimatwethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumatwethoko|thuthumatwethoko]] || [[word:jujumatwethoko|jujumatwethoko]] || [[word:shushumatwethoko|shushumatwethoko]] || [[word:kukumatwethoko|kukumatwethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumatwethoko|thumatwethoko]] || [[word:jumatwethoko|jumatwethoko]] || [[word:shumatwethoko|shumatwethoko]] || [[word:kumatwethoko|kumatwethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumatwethoko|thumatwethoko]] || [[word:jumatwethoko|jumatwethoko]] || [[word:shumatwethoko|shumatwethoko]] || [[word:kumatwethoko|kumatwethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thematwethoko|thematwethoko]] || [[word:jematwethoko|jematwethoko]] || [[word:shematwethoko|shematwethoko]] || [[word:kematwethoko|kematwethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomatwethoko|thothomatwethoko]] || [[word:jojomatwethoko|jojomatwethoko]] || [[word:shoshomatwethoko|shoshomatwethoko]] || [[word:kokomatwethoko|kokomatwethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomatwethoko|thomatwethoko]] || [[word:jomatwethoko|jomatwethoko]] || [[word:shomatwethoko|shomatwethoko]] || [[word:komatwethoko|komatwethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomatwethoko|thomatwethoko]] || [[word:jomatwethoko|jomatwethoko]] || [[word:shomatwethoko|shomatwethoko]] || [[word:komatwethoko|komatwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙matwethoko|th忙matwethoko]] || [[word:j忙matwethoko|j忙matwethoko]] || [[word:sh忙matwethoko|sh忙matwethoko]] || [[word:k忙matwethoko|k忙matwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamatwethoko|thathamatwethoko]] || [[word:jajamatwethoko|jajamatwethoko]] || [[word:shashamatwethoko|shashamatwethoko]] || [[word:kakamatwethoko|kakamatwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamatwethoko|thamatwethoko]] || [[word:jamatwethoko|jamatwethoko]] || [[word:shamatwethoko|shamatwethoko]] || [[word:kamatwethoko|kamatwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamatwethoko|thamatwethoko]] || [[word:jamatwethoko|jamatwethoko]] || [[word:shamatwethoko|shamatwethoko]] || [[word:kamatwethoko|kamatwethoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
